description.unified: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, knocking them down for [3 sec->1sec]. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing Physical DMG, knocking them down for [ (added) 1sec], and increasing Physical DMG taken by [25%->20%] for [10 sec->4sec].

Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for [15 sec->7sec], increasing ATK and Physical Evasion Chance by [250->300]. When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical DMG is increased by [5%->2%][ (removed) for 20 sec] for 7sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing Physical DMG and stunning them for [3 sec->1.8sec]. This skill gains an additional [500->800] Physical Defense Penetration.

On Normal Attack, has a [15%->20%] chance to deal additional Physical DMG, stunning the target for [1 sec->0.5sec], and [(added) increasing Physical DMG taken by 15% for 5sec]. This skill ignores the target’s damage reduction effects.

dark.unified: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by 250.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000], and when triggered, removes all beneficial effects from all enemies.

dark.unified: Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by [40%->20%] for [10 sec->7 sec].

light.unified: Cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec.

dark.unified: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for [20 sec->10 sec] and grants immunity to status ailments for [10 sec->5 sec]. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Fierce Wind] increases DMG by 50% and P.DMG taken by the target by {0}% for 4 sec.
[Wind Reading] All effects become irremovable and upon activation, heals own HP equal to {0}% of Max HP.
[Dive Bomb] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
[Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by [10%->5%], and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP.

dark.unified: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by [30->35] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: On hit, increases the target’s Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by {1} for 10 sec. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by {2}%, and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
